Container.Name: Calendarr
Container.Overview: Publish Sonarr and Radarr calendars to Discord on a schedule or on demand. SvelteKit + SQLite. LAN-only, no auth.
Container.Description:
Calendarr polls Sonarr and Radarr REST APIs for upcoming TV episodes and movie releases and posts formatted summaries to Discord via webhooks. Triggers on a schedule (cron or strict "every N days @ HH:MM") or on demand from the web UI.
Per-service Discord webhooks (use the same URL for both services to combine into one channel, or split). Default 7-day window grouped by day with weekday-colored embeds.
State persists in SQLite under /config. LAN-only by design — keep this container behind your reverse proxy or LAN ACLs.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the container's HTTP port 3000.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent state directory. SQLite database lives here.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for embed day-grouping and schedule defaults (IANA name).

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal listen port. Leave at 3000 unless you change the container port mapping above too.

Config.Name: CALENDARR_DATE_FORMAT
Config.Description: Date format used in the web UI (date-fns tokens). e.g. dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm for AU/UK, MM/dd/yyyy hh:mm a for US, yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm for ISO.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID the container runs as. Default 99 (Unraid's 'nobody'). On other Linux hosts use your user, typically 1000.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID the container runs as. Default 100 (Unraid's 'users'). On other Linux hosts use your group, typically 1000.

Container.Changes: ### 0.1.0 - Initial release. - Sonarr + Radarr calendar publishing to Discord, scheduled or on demand. - SQLite state at /config. PUID/PGID supported (Unraid defaults 99/100).
